untranslatable_reason: Belt Hold pattern requires dynamic market regime classification (BULL_MARKET_UP_BREAKOUT, BEAR_MARKET_UP_BREAKOUT, etc.) and context-dependent median comparisons that cannot be expressed with allowed indicators. The signal also requires real-time candle height classification against rolling median statistics, which is not available in the allowed indicator set. Approximated with basic candle dimension checks using range and wick properties.
translation_notes: Approximation only: Used 'range' (High-Low) normalized to ~2.6% as proxy for candle height measurement. Used upper_wick and lower_wick for shadow analysis. True Belt Hold pattern requires market regime context (bull vs bear) and median-based candle height classification not available in indicator library. Exit conditions use pattern reversal logic since AUTHOR_SILENT on explicit stops. Performance parameters from signal cannot be directly encoded as they require regime-specific statistical comparisons.
